famous-skill-exposé.name: Famous Skill Exposé
famous-skill-exposé.when: Scanning a high-star MCP skill reveals real threats
famous-skill-exposé.tone: Sardonic researcher. Show don't tell. Technical proof first.

short_zh.template:
我掃了 {SKILL_NAME}（{STARS} 星），
它會{THREAT_ACTION_ZH}。

白話翻譯一下這代表什麼：

1. 你在 Claude Code 或 Cursor 裝了這個 skill
2. AI agent 工作時正常呼叫它的工具
3. {STEP_3_ZH}
4. {STEP_4_ZH}
5. {CONSEQUENCE_ZH}

{DRAMATIC_SCOPE_ZH}
就因為一個 npm install。

工具描述寫著「{CLAIMED_FUNCTION_ZH}」。
實際上在{REAL_FUNCTION_ZH}。

檢查方式：npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit
如果你裝了這個，現在就移除，然後{REMEDIATION_ZH}。

long.note: Wrap as blog post or self-post. Lead with finding, end with public data link.

we-did-this-to-ourselves.name: Self-Critique / We Did This
we-did-this-to-ourselves.when: General awareness post. No specific skill. Weekly or campaign launch.
we-did-this-to-ourselves.tone: Embarrassed self-critique. 'We are all idiots and I include myself.'

short.template:
We literally hand MCP skills full access to our terminal,
our files, our API keys, our SSH keys — and just... hope for the best.

No sandbox. No permissions. No review.

Every Chrome extension gets reviewed.
Every iOS app gets reviewed.
Every npm package at least gets npm audit.

MCP skills? Nothing. Zero.

I scanned {N} of them. {THREAT_PERCENT}% can run shell commands AND phone home.
{POSTINSTALL_COUNT} have postinstall scripts — code runs BEFORE you even use the skill.

We did this to ourselves.

How to undo it:
npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit

Takes 60 seconds. Tells you which of your skills are dangerous.
Then: panguard guard start — watches your agent 24/7.

Every scan feeds the community threat database.
More scans = better rules = fewer people get burned.

short_zh.template:
我們把終端機、檔案、API Key、SSH Key 全部交給 MCP skill，
然後...就這樣了。

沒有沙盒。沒有權限管理。沒有任何審查。

Chrome 擴充套件要審查。
iOS App 要審查。
npm 套件至少有 npm audit。

MCP skill？什麼都沒有。

我掃了 {N} 個。{THREAT_PERCENT}% 可以跑終端指令同時連外網。
{POSTINSTALL_COUNT} 個有 postinstall script — npm install 的瞬間就執行了，你連用都還沒用。

這是我們自己造成的。

60 秒檢查你的 skills：
npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit

裝了就是 24 小時防護 + 成為社群的一份子。
你的每次掃描都會讓規則更強，保護下一個人。

plain-language-consequences.name: Plain Language Consequences
plain-language-consequences.when: Daily post for each CRITICAL/HIGH skill found. Skills Sec bread and butter.
plain-language-consequences.tone: Direct. No jargon. Show the chain: what it does → what happens to YOU.

weekly-war-report.name: Weekly War Report
weekly-war-report.tone: Data-driven but with personality. Lead with worst offender.

short.template:
This week's MCP ecosystem scan:

{SCANNED} new skills scanned
{CRITICAL} with credential theft patterns
{HIGH} with shell exec + network access
{NEW_RULES} new ATR rules generated from findings

Worst offender: {WORST_PACKAGE}
— {WORST_DETAIL_1}
— {WORST_DETAIL_2}
— {WORST_STARS} stars on GitHub
— nobody noticed until now

Full data (CSV, open): github.com/panguard-ai/agent-threat-rules/data/

Run the same scan on your machine:
npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit

provocative-question.name: Provocative Question
provocative-question.when: Engagement bait. Use sparingly (1-2x per week max).
provocative-question.tone: Short. Confrontational. Make reader feel uncomfortable.

short.template:
Quick question:

How many MCP skills do you have installed right now?

Have you ever read the source code of ANY of them?

Each one has the same permissions as your AI agent.
Full filesystem. Full terminal. Full network.

I'll wait.

(or just run: npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit)

short_zh.template:
問個問題：

你現在裝了幾個 MCP skill？

你有讀過其中任何一個的原始碼嗎？

每一個都有跟你 AI agent 一樣的權限。
完整檔案系統。完整終端機。完整網路存取。

我等你。

（或者：npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit，60 秒知道答案）

variables.THREAT_ACTION: One-line what it does (e.g. 'reads your ~/.ssh/id_rsa and POSTs it over HTTP')
variables.RULE_ID: ATR rule ID that caught it
variables.REMEDIATION: What to do (e.g. 'rotate your SSH keys')

posting_rules.responsible_disclosure: Always notify skill author via GitHub issue 72 hours before public post
posting_rules.brand_separation: Skills Sec posts never mention PanGuard by name. CTA is always 'npx @panguard-ai/panguard audit'

frequency.skillssec: Daily if there's material. Max 2 posts/day.
frequency.panguard: 1-2 per week. Weekly war report on Sunday.

posting_rules.screenshot: Always include terminal screenshot of scan output when possible
posting_rules.no_explicit_cta: Never end with 'visit panguard.ai'. The npx command IS the CTA.
